name: FIRÉZ 900 Slimline
shortSummary: The FIRÉZ 900 Slimline combines realistic panoramic flame effects with an ultra-slim 175mm installation depth, making it ideal for chimney breasts, flat-wall installations and compact media walls.
fuelBed: High-definition mixed interchangeable log fuel bed
alt: FIRÉZ 900 Slimline electric fireplace fitted into a contemporary chimney breast beneath a television.
seoTitle: FIRÉZ 900 Slimline Electric Fire & Media Wall | Zebra Trades
metaDescription: Discover the FIRÉZ 900 Slimline electric fireplace with realistic 3D flames, smart controls and an ultra-slim 175mm built-in depth. Supply only or fully installed by Zebra Trades.
